description: At month-end, an accountant needs to allocate shared corporate costs (e.g., rent, IT) to the different business units based on headcount.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the total corporate overhead costs for the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the total amount to be allocated.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the month-end headcount for each business unit.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the headcount for Sales, Marketing, and R&D.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the allocation percentage for each business unit based on its share of the total headcount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the allocation percentages.

nodes.task_description: Create and post the journal entry to allocate the costs from the corporate cost center to the business unit cost centers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the correct allocation journal entry.
